title: platanus × acerifolia var. pyramidalis
intro: Platanus × acerifolia var. pyramidalis, also known as London Planetree, is a hybrid deciduous tree that is a cross between the Oriental plane (Platanus orientalis) and the American sycamore (Platanus occidentalis). The medicinal properties of London Planetree include its bark, which has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of London Planetree include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
